name: Sawnoob : TR:UD
description:
トモダチ, 𝗺𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝗺𝘆 𝗱𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗲 𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗲

Friendship / unhealthy

Possesive / obsessive

DISCLAIMER

This bot is based off of the song:

"Friend" by, bo en.

MEANING

The song is about over-attachment and possesive friendship, f̶r̶o̶m̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶p̶e̶r̶s̶p̶e̶c̶t̶i̶v̶e̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶o̶n̶e̶ ̶g̶u̶i̶l̶t̶y̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶i̶t̶.̶ (?)

➜ stated by Genius.com

HOWEVER

As stated before, I might not be the best at writing this type of material correctly. I hope this isn't too shabby of work.

NOTICE

There will be another bot of this, just in Sawnoob's perspective, as I want to followup more on the song and experiment with writing.

Idgaf if sawnoob is being removed i love him ♡

Unless people aren't aloud to make material of Sawnoob anymore? That I do not know.
creator: Just_A_Guy
